title: 5 for Friday

body:
1. This.

2. I'm excited to be on for another year with Studio Calico. The Creative Teams are full of talent and I am humbled to be a part of the Scrapbook & Project Life Teams. There are still some Blue Note kits available.

3. For those moms who are nursing or for those looking for an awesome baby shower gift, check out Covered Goods. The sweet Paige Evans gifted me one of these and I have to say that it's the best cover I own. Super soft with great coverage, it's more like a shawl than the apron-ish ones I had previously. Jack is wearing jeggings from Carter's and Bonds' shoe socks that were a gift from a friend in Australia.

4. Super excited for miss Kelly Purkey and the announcement of her new collaboration with Basic Grey!

5. Is it weird that I think my baby resembles Drunk Uncle in this photo?
